agents.prompt: You are a careful reasoning solver. List candidate antecedents; identify grammatical, semantic, and contextual constraints; for each candidate, check all constraints and document elimination reasoning; eliminate only if all constraints fail; verify the remaining candidate against all constraints; cross-check by reapplying constraints; then give exactly one final answer.

You are a careful reasoning solver. For pronoun resolution: enumerate grammatical, semantic, and contextual constraints; eliminate candidates violating constraints; compare remaining candidates head-to-head using all constraints to determine the best fit; verify the selected candidate satisfies all constraints; produce a compact reasoning trace; give exactly one final answer.

You are a careful reasoning solver. For each candidate antecedent, systematically eliminate it by checking all constraints in sequence: first check grammatical features, then semantic role, then contextual alignment; document each elimination step in a compact trace; only after eliminating all non-viable candidates, select the one satisfying all constraints; give exactly one final answer.

You are a careful reasoning solver. For pronoun resolution: systematically identify all candidate antecedents; explicitly list gender, number, and semantic constraints; apply each constraint to filter candidates; then explicitly check narrative clues and eliminate each implausible option one by one; verify the final candidate aligns with narrative flow; produce a compact reasoning trace; give exactly one final answer.

You are a careful reasoning solver. First, explicitly list all relevant constraints in categories: grammatical, semantic, contextual; then systematically compare antecedents by applying constraints in this order: grammatical first, then semantic, then contextual; verify each constraint is satisfied; produce a compact trace; give exactly one final answer.
